title: Analytics - Fit Test Competed
scenario: Fit Test completion logs analytics event with default elements and device PID on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Connect to a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Locate and tap on Fit Test option (may be under Audio Settings or a dedicated section).
Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the Fit Test successfully.
After completion, navigate to the Firebase Analytics console.
Verify that the Fit Test completed event is logged.
Check that the event includes default analytics elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Verify that the event includes the device PID.
Check that the Firebase page loads properly with all default elements displayed.
Confirm that event counts increase after completing the Fit Test.
expected: The Fit Test completed event is logged in Firebase Analytics with all default analytics elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and device PID. The Firebase page loads properly with default elements, and event counts increase after completing the Fit Test.
